attempts.strategy: Split the module SES (R^n projective) and carry the splitting through additive tilde, then kernel-uniqueness.
attempts.code_tried: haveI : Projective T.X₃ := by change Projective Rn; infer_instance; sp := hTse.splittingOfProjective; (sp.map (tilde.functor R)).fIsKernel; IsLimit.conePointUniqueUpToIso hkerS hkerT
attempts.insight: tilde is Additive, so Splitting.map carries the splitting; (sp.map _).fIsKernel gives tilde K as a kernel of tilde φ definitionally; conePointUniqueUpToIso vs the transported S.f kernel yields S.X₁ ≅ tilde T.X₁ (rfl). No PreservesFiniteLimits needed.
